description.zh: 谁偷吃了蛋糕？读线索、在网格上钉下 ❌ 和 ✅，看排除法像多米诺一样连锁倒下，红线在软木板上织出真相之网——经典逻辑网格谜题的侦探社版本。
description.en: Who ate the cake? Read clues, pin ❌ and ✅ on the grid, and watch elimination cascade like dominoes as red strings weave the truth across the corkboard — classic logic-grid puzzles, detective style.
